top_signals.title: New Dolphin X malware uses AI to rank high-value targets
top_signals.summary: A new Dolphin X remote access trojan claims to use an AI-powered profiling feature to score and rank infected users, helping cybercriminals identify which victims should be targeted first. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: India May Allow Portfolio Managers to Short Sell Stocks
top_signals.summary: India’s securities regulator has proposed allowing domestic portfolio management service providers to take short positions in equity derivatives for the first time, easing rules for professional money managers even as it tightens oversight of retail trading.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
